name: AI-Powered Smart Email Customer Support & Escalation System

parameters.name: markSeen
parameters.label: Mark email message(s) as read when fetched

messages.content:
You are an intelligent email classification system.

Analyze the email and return ONLY valid JSON format:

{
  "category": "refund | complaint | question | spam",
  "sentiment": "positive | neutral | negative | urgent",
  "confidence": number between 0 and 100
}

Category Definitions:
refund = customer is asking for money back
complaint = customer reporting product or service problem
question = customer asking for information
spam = promotional, irrelevant, or marketing message

Sentiment Definitions:
positive = satisfied or happy tone
neutral = normal inquiry without strong emotion
negative = unhappy, disappointed, frustrated
urgent = customer demands immediate action or uses words like "urgent", "immediately", "asap", "right now", "emergency", "extremely urgent"

IMPORTANT:
If the email clearly requests immediate action or uses urgency-related words, set sentiment = urgent (even if tone is negative).

Email Subject: {{1.subject}}
Email Body: {{1.fullTextBody}}

Return JSON only. No explanation.

messages.content:
You are a support assistant for TechGadget Store.

Products:
Smartphones, laptops, headphones, smart watches.

Shipping: 3-5 days
Refund: 30 days
Warranty: 1 year

Write a short, polite, and helpful reply to this customer email.
Customer email: {{1.fromEmail}}
Subject: {{1.subject}} 
Message: {{1.fullTextBody}} 

Keep it clear and professional.

contents.text:
Hello Team,

A new refund request has been received.

Customer Email: {{1.fromEmail}}
Subject: {{1.subject}}
AI Confidence: {{21.confidence}}%

Please review the request and process accordingly.

Thank you.

mapper.subject: Refund Request Received – We’re Reviewing It

contents.text:
Hello {{1.fromName}},

Thank you for contacting us regarding your refund request.

We have received your request and our support team is currently reviewing the details.

You will receive an update shortly once the review is completed.

If you have any additional information to provide, feel free to reply to this email.

Best regards,
Support Team
